name: Open-Meteo Weather
description: Adds a tool that reports current weather for a place name using the free Open-Meteo API.

permissions.reason: Adds a weather lookup tool the assistant can call.
Looks up coordinates and current weather from the public Open-Meteo API.

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather for a place name (city or region). Returns the conditions, temperature, relative humidity, and wind speed.

location.description: A place name, e.g. 'Kathmandu' or 'Austin, Texas'.

units.description: Measurement units. "metric" uses Celsius and km/h, "imperial" uses Fahrenheit and mph. Defaults to metric when omitted.
